detectors.description:
baseToken.swapTokenForFund(uint256) (DiabloElon.sol#627-701) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- (tmpSuccess,None) = address(marketingAddress).call{gas: 30000,value: fundAmount}() (DiabloElon.sol#671)
detectors.markdown:
[baseToken.swapTokenForFund(uint256)](DiabloElon.sol#L627-L701) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [(tmpSuccess,None) = address(marketingAddress).call{gas: 30000,value: fundAmount}()](DiabloElon.sol#L671)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in baseToken._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DiabloElon.sol#473-529):
	External calls:
	- swapTokenForFund(contractTokenBalance) (DiabloElon.sol#503)
		- router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(amountToSwap,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DiabloElon.sol#641-653)
		- (tmpSuccess,None) = address(marketingAddress).call{gas: 30000,value: fundAmount}() (DiabloElon.sol#671)
		- router.addLiquidityETH{value: amountETHLiquidity}(address(this),amountToLiquify,0,0,marketingAddress,block.timestamp) (DiabloElon.sol#681-695)
	External calls sending eth:
	- swapTokenForFund(contractTokenBalance) (DiabloElon.sol#503)
		- (tmpSuccess,None) = address(marketingAddress).call{gas: 30000,value: fundAmount}() (DiabloElon.sol#671)
		- router.addLiquidityETH{value: amountETHLiquidity}(address(this),amountToLiquify,0,0,marketingAddress,block.timestamp) (DiabloElon.sol#681-695)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _takeTransfer(from,to,amount) (DiabloElon.sol#521)
		- _balances[to] = _balances[to] + tAmount (DiabloElon.sol#715)
	baseToken._balances (DiabloElon.sol#295) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- baseToken._takeTransfer(address,address,uint256) (DiabloElon.sol#705-719)
	- baseToken._tokenTransfer(address,address,uint256,bool) (DiabloElon.sol#563-623)
	- baseToken.balanceOf(address) (DiabloElon.sol#437)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DiabloElon.sol#527)
		- _balances[sender] = _balances[sender] - tAmount (DiabloElon.sol#575)
		- _balances[to] = _balances[to] + tAmount (DiabloElon.sol#715)
	baseToken._balances (DiabloElon.sol#295) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- baseToken._takeTransfer(address,address,uint256) (DiabloElon.sol#705-719)
	- baseToken._tokenTransfer(address,address,uint256,bool) (DiabloElon.sol#563-623)
	- baseToken.balanceOf(address) (DiabloElon.sol#437)
	- startTradeBlock = block.number (DiabloElon.sol#519)
	baseToken.startTradeBlock (DiabloElon.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- baseToken._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DiabloElon.sol#473-529)
	- baseToken.startTradeBlock (DiabloElon.sol#339)
	- startTradeBlock = 0 (DiabloElon.sol#519)
	baseToken.startTradeBlock (DiabloElon.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- baseToken._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DiabloElon.sol#473-529)
	- baseToken.startTradeBlock (DiabloElon.sol#339)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [baseToken._transfer(address,address,uint256)](DiabloElon.sol#L473-L529):
	External calls:

		- [router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(amountToSwap,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](DiabloElon.sol#L641-L653)
		- [(tmpSuccess,None) = address(marketingAddress).call{gas: 30000,value: fundAmount}()](DiabloElon.sol#L671)
		- [router.addLiquidityETH{value: amountETHLiquidity}(address(this),amountToLiquify,0,0,marketingAddress,block.timestamp)](DiabloElon.sol#L681-L695)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [swapTokenForFund(contractTokenBalance)](DiabloElon.sol#L503)
		- [(tmpSuccess,None) = address(marketingAddress).call{gas: 30000,value: fundAmount}()](DiabloElon.sol#L671)
		- [router.addLiquidityETH{value: amountETHLiquidity}(address(this),amountToLiquify,0,0,marketingAddress,block.timestamp)](DiabloElon.sol#L681-L695)

	- [_takeTransfer(from,to,amount)](DiabloElon.sol#L521)
		- [_balances[to] = _balances[to] + tAmount](DiabloElon.sol#L715)

	- [baseToken._takeTransfer(address,address,uint256)](DiabloElon.sol#L705-L719)
	- [baseToken._tokenTransfer(address,address,uint256,bool)](DiabloElon.sol#L563-L623)
	- [baseToken.balanceOf(address)](DiabloElon.sol#L437)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](DiabloElon.sol#L527)
		- [_balances[sender] = _balances[sender] - tAmount](DiabloElon.sol#L575)
		- [_balances[to] = _balances[to] + tAmount](DiabloElon.sol#L715)

	- [baseToken._takeTransfer(address,address,uint256)](DiabloElon.sol#L705-L719)

	[baseToken.startTradeBlock](DiabloElon.sol#L339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [baseToken._transfer(address,address,uint256)](DiabloElon.sol#L473-L529)
	- [baseToken.startTradeBlock](DiabloElon.sol#L339)

		- router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(amountToSwap,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DiabloElon.sol#641-653)
		- (tmpSuccess,None) = address(marketingAddress).call{gas: 30000,value: fundAmount}() (DiabloElon.sol#671)
		- router.addLiquidityETH{value: amountETHLiquidity}(address(this),amountToLiquify,0,0,marketingAddress,block.timestamp) (DiabloElon.sol#681-695)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (DiabloElon.sol#449)
		- (tmpSuccess,None) = address(marketingAddress).call{gas: 30000,value: fundAmount}() (DiabloElon.sol#671)
		- router.addLiquidityETH{value: amountETHLiquidity}(address(this),amountToLiquify,0,0,marketingAddress,block.timestamp) (DiabloElon.sol#681-695)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _allowances[sender][msg.sender] = _allowances[sender][msg.sender] - amount (DiabloElon.sol#453)
